current_html:
§ 200.402 Composition of costs.

The total cost of a Federal award is the sum of the allowable direct and allocable indirect costs minus any applicable credits
proposed_html:
§ 200.402
Composition of costs.

The total cost of a Federal award is the sum of the allowable direct and indirect costs minus any applicable credits.
diff_html:
1 paragraph changed · 1 addition · 1 deletion

The total cost of a Federal award is the sum of the allowable direct and allocable indirect costs minus any applicable credits.
